scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number]pid1001 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Supported: timer,100rel Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 180 Ringing [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number]pid1001 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,ACK,OPTIONS,BYE,CANCEL,INFO,REFER,NOTIFY,PRACK,UPDATE Content-Length:[len] Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0 o=251512 3720043571 2739 IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] s=SIP Call RV XT1000 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] b=AS:4096 t=0 0 m=audio 3282 RTP/AVP 9 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000 [$2] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sendrecv

send.recv: SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number]pid1001 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,ACK,OPTIONS,BYE,CANCEL,INFO,REFER,NOTIFY,PRACK,UPDATE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:0

scenario.send: SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number]pid1001 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,ACK,OPTIONS,BYE,CANCEL,INFO,REFER,NOTIFY,PRACK,UPDATE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]
